ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest_bust" INTEGER /* Chest or bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches (8" from waist) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size standard is applicable */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "hip_circumference" INTEGER /* Hip circumference measurement in inches */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the conversion (e.g., EU, Asia) */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the target region */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* Factor used for conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clothing type */,
  "example_models" TEXT /* Example models or styles of the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement guideline */,
  "clothing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of how to take measurements for the clothing type */,
  "shoulder_width_description" TEXT /* Description for measuring shoulder width */,
  "sleeve_length_description" TEXT /* Description for measuring sleeve length */,
  "inseam_length_description" TEXT /* Description for measuring inseam length */,
  "hip_circumference_description" TEXT /* Description for measuring hip circumference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_guidelines_clothing_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "prefered_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's preferred size */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty program points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "chest_bust" INTEGER /* Chest or bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches (8" from waist) */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "hip_circumference" INTEGER /* Hip circumference measurement in inches */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "clothing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size based on customer measurements */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_clothing_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "clothing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit from 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "fit_issues" TEXT /* Specific fit issues */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_clothing_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_id")
)
